## Related issues

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation / tooling only

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify the change? Commands, scenarios, screenshots. -->

```sh
crystal spec
```

## Checklist

- [ ] `crystal spec` passes locally
- [ ] `crystal tool format` was run
- [ ] Public API additions are documented in `README.md`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under an `[Unreleased]` or new version section
- [ ] One flat `module CryBase::CouchBase` declaration per file, mirroring the folder layout
